title: Ranger-class gunship
content:
{{Top|fga|leg|title=''Ranger''-class gunship}} {{StarshipClass |image= |name=''Ranger''-class gunship |designer= |manufacturer=[[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' |line= |model= |type=[[Gunship/Legends|Gunship]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=[[Engine/Legends|Equipped]] |hyperdrive=[[Hyperdrive/Legends|Equipped]] |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=Dozens of [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] batteries |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role=Gunship |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] *[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' }} {{Quote|The Ranger gunships will handle any of the smaller—what did you call them? Coralskippers?—while ''Rejuvenator'' takes out whatever base those barbarians have set up. It will be a clean sweep, I assure you, and then we can get on with the more important issues facing the New Republic.|Commander Warshack Rojo|}} The '''''Ranger''-class gunship''', also referred to as a '''Ranger gunship''', was a type of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] designed by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] and used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] against the invading [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Capable of destroying many [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] with its dozens of [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser]] batteries, the ''Ranger''-class [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] saw action at [[Helska IV]] and [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. One Ranger gunship, [[Justice (Ranger-class)|''Justice'']], participated in an [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|attack]] by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], the New Republic's successor state, on the Yuuzhan Vong–held [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. ==Characteristics== The ''Ranger''-class [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]], also known as the Ranger gunship, was designed by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] and was armed with dozens of [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] batteries. The gunship also possessed [[Engine/Legends|engines]] and a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], and a single individual commanded it. ==Role== The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] used the ''Ranger''-class gunship to engage and eliminate groups of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] with its [[Laser/Legends|laser]] batteries,''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' though it was also used by the New Republic and its successor state, the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], in the arena of [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]. ==History== ===The Yuuzhan Vong War begins=== {{Quote|Impressive.''"
"''Newest and best.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and Leia Organa Solo discuss the ''Ranger''-class gunship|}} Newly serving in the New Republic Defense Fleet as of [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' the ''Ranger''-class gunship was, according to former New Republic [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], one of the best [[Starship/Legends|starships]] at that [[Time/Legends|time]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[Praetorite Vong]] vanguard of the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] ventured into the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in what became the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], making [[Destruction of Sernpidal|forays]] [[Battle of Dubrillion|to]] the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]] and [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] and setting up a [[Helska IV base|base]] on the [[Water/Legends|ice]] world of [[Helska IV]]. In response, the New Republic dispatched a task force to eliminate the aggressors in the [[Helska system/Legends|Helska system]], led by the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Rejuvenator]]''—under the command of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Warshack Rojo]]—and featuring six ''Ranger''-class gunships. Rojo intended to have the ''Ranger''-class gunships hold off the Praetorite Vong [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] while the ''Rejuvenator'' took care of the enemy base. However, although the initial [[Battle of Helska IV|engagement]] went well, the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] capabilities of the enemy forces soon overwhelmed the New Republic's task force, with the ''Rejuvenator'' going down and three of the ''Ranger''-class gunships being destroyed, two of which were smashed into a large coralskipper when it used a [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]-manipulating [[dovin basal]] to suck them in. The remains of the task force retreated, and, though a successful counterattack was launched that saw the destruction of Helska IV and the Praetorite Vong base, the commanders of the surviving gunships opted to wait for additional reinforcements rather than joining the second strike. ===Action at Ord Mantell and Bilbringi=== Later in 25 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], five ''Ranger''-class gunships took part in another New Republic task force that aimed to protect the planet [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]] against an imminent Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attack]]. Hiding with the majority of the task force behind the [[Star system/Legends|star system's]] fifth planet, [[Quatin]],''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' the ''Ranger''-class gunships and the other vessels ambushed the incoming Yuuzhan Vong [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] as it passed by. During the fighting, a pair of gunships dispatched dozens of coralskippers as they sought to outflank a Yuuzhan Vong [[Warship/Legends|warship]]. The Yuuzhan Vong were eventually driven out of the system, leaving the New Republic victorious. In [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' places the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]] nineteen [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the start of the novel, and the [[Battle of Esfandia]]—which occurs at the end of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''—two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] prior to the start of ''The Unifying Force''. Thus, the Battles of [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]] and [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]] are approximately three months apart. The Battle of Yuuzhan'tar occurs in [[Great ReSynchronization|64:6]], according to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', so the Battle of Esfandia and the end of ''Reunion'' must therefore occur no earlier than 64:3, the first month of the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. Thus, ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'', which occurs between ''Reunion'' and ''The Unifying Force'', must fall in 29 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], despite ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' placing it in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].—by which time the New Republic had transitioned into the Galactic Alliance—the ''Ranger''-class gunship{{CSWECite|II|183|''Justice''}} [[Justice (Ranger-class)|''Justice'']] fought in a joint Galactic Alliance–[[Imperial Remnant]] [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|attack]] on the Yuuzhan Vong–held system of [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]]. As the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] that the allied forces were using for communications was taken down due to interference from Yuuzhan Vong [[Unidentified Yuuzhan Vong drone|drones]], only ''Justice'' and a third of the planned attack force under Galactic Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] made it to Bilbringi. Despite facing a larger enemy contingent, Antilles managed to retreat from the system, though ''Justice'' was heavily damaged during the fighting. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Ranger''-class gunship first appeared in the [[1999]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', written by [[R. A. Salvatore]] as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. The gunship class later made appearances in two more ''The New Jedi Order'' installments, [[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial|''Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial'']] and [[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy|''The Final Prophecy'']], released in [[2000]] and [[2003]], respectively. It also received a short entry in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and was mentioned in ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'', released in [[2012]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ranger-Klasse Kanonenboot |es=Cañonera clase Ranger }} [[Category:Corellian Engineering Corporation products]] [[Category:Gunship starship classes]] [[Category:Starship classes of the Galactic Alliance]] [[Category:Starship classes of the New Republic]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Ranger-class gunships]] }}
